projectDescription: An AI-powered electronic component search and BOM management platform that reads datasheets end-to-end to help hardware engineers find, compare, and organize parts for PCB design.
keyFeatures: Natural language component search across part numbers, specs, and plain English
Deep datasheet extraction of structured specs and parameters
Context-aware search using active BOM, library, and ruleset
Projects, revisions, and BOMs for full design lifecycle management
BOM import from CSV, XLSX, JSON, and YAML
Libraries for preferred/approved part sets with search bias
Rulesets to encode supply-chain, lifecycle, cost, and qualification policy
MCP integration with Claude, ChatGPT, and Gemini
Quick look with keyboard-driven inspection workflow
Design calculators derived from datasheet data
Series navigation for exploring part families and variants
Workspace-level sharing for teams and organizations
publicApiSurface: MCP tool: search components with project/BOM/library/ruleset context
MCP tool: open component details (specs, datasheet metadata, distributor pricing)
MCP tool: read and edit projects and BOMs
MCP tool: read and edit libraries
MCP tool: read and edit rulesets and named config variants
Claude connector setup (custom connector UI or claude mcp add --transport http)
ChatGPT app setup (Developer mode, Create app)
Gemini CLI setup (gemini mcp add --transport http)
